notes: Confirmed via local `uvx snyk-agent-scan==0.5.1 --skills skills/peer-review/SKILL.md` on 2026-05-17. W011 and W012 persist deterministically despite spec 30 + spec 34 + spec 40 hardening; the scanner is heuristic on `gh pr view`/`gh pr diff` (W011) and external-CLI handoff (W012). W007 (insecure credential handling) is heuristic on the Step 4b path asymmetry — Step 4b's pre-flight secret scan runs only on the external-CLI reviewer path, so PR diffs containing secrets reach the self/claude reviewer prompt without redaction. W007 fired intermittently during spec 40 development depending on how the `## Security model` prose framed the asymmetry, and clears 20/20 against the current SKILL.md. It is intentionally NOT pinned in this baseline: `scan.sh` `diff_findings()` treats any baselined finding as expected (only new IDs or severity escalations fail the gate), so pinning a currently-cleared W007 would mask a future recurrence rather than anchor against it. Keeping W007 unbaselined means a future scanner re-emergence trips the regression gate, which is the intended behavior. Closing the structural asymmetry fully would require hoisting Step 4b ahead of all reviewer dispatches (a behavior change deferred to a follow-up spec); it is acknowledged in `skills/peer-review/SKILL.md` `## Security model` Residual risks. Spec 40 added: Step 2b PR-content prompt-injection screening pass (POSIX-ERE patterns covering override imperatives, claimed-role phrases, role-impersonation, HTML/details hidden content, hex/base64 payloads, zero-width / bidi unicode, Cyrillic homoglyph adjacency); 256 KB byte-accurate PR-content size guard (`LC_ALL=C wc -c` + `head -c`, not character-counting `${#var}`); multi-line evasion defense via `tr -s '[:space:]' ' '` whitespace normalization before line-oriented regex scanning; literal-string redaction in `screen_context()` via Python env-var transport (defeats the bash `${var//$match/...}` glob-semantics leak on backslash-bearing matches) plus `head -n 1` guards on the windowed grep so multi-occurrence normalized input does not leak unredacted later matches; confirmation pause on overflow; screening-independence invariant; argument-validation length caps + `..` rejection on `--pr` / `--branch`; compact `> **Security note**` banner above the `gh pr view` sub-block for scanner adjacency.
